summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodeForge AI platform - All requested features working. Login page with Google and SMS buttons visible, SMS authentication flow complete (MOCKED), Dashboard with Guided Wizard button, Create page with preview buttons (Web, App, PDF, DOCX), AI generation API with Emergent fallback, and FR/EN language selector all functional.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 500 with '401: Code invalide' message instead of HTTP 401 for invalid codes
Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 are working: Login page with Google and SMS buttons, SMS authentication (MOCKED - code returned in API response), Dashboard with Guided Wizard button and FR/EN language selector, Create page with preview buttons (Web, App, PDF, DOCX), AI generation API with Emergent fallback. The SMS authentication returns the verification code in the API response for testing purposes.

login_page_google_button.details: Google login button visible with data-testid='google-login-btn'

login_page_sms_button.details: SMS login button visible with data-testid='sms-login-btn'

sms_authentication_send.details: SMS code sent successfully, code returned in response (MOCKED)

sms_authentication_verify.details: SMS code verification creates session and redirects to dashboard

dashboard_guided_wizard_button.details: Guided Wizard button visible with data-testid='wizard-btn'

dashboard_language_selector.details: FR/EN language toggle working, UI text changes accordingly

create_page_preview_web.details: Web preview button visible with data-testid='preview-web-btn'

create_page_preview_app.details: App preview button visible with data-testid='preview-app-btn'

create_page_preview_pdf.details: PDF preview button visible with data-testid='preview-pdf-btn'

create_page_preview_docx.details: DOCX preview button visible with data-testid='preview-docx-btn'

ai_generate_complete_app_api.details: API returns generated code with fallback to template when Ollama unavailable

preview_demo_endpoints.details: All demo preview endpoints (web, pdf, docx, app, image) return valid HTML

mocked_apis.sms_verification: Code is returned in API response instead of actual SMS delivery - for testing purposes
mocked_apis.ollama_offline: Requires local Ollama installation with 5GB+ RAM - falls back to Emergent AI or template
